title: Arthur Mourgue
wikitext:
{{short description|France international rugby league footballer}} {{Use dmy dates|date=October 2024}} {{Infobox rugby league biography | name = Arthur Mourgue | fullname = | image = Hull Kingston Rovers vs Hull F.C. 7-9-2025 Arthur Mourgue (cropped).jpg | image_size = | birth_date = {{birth date and age|df=yes|1999|5|2}} | birth_place = [[Saint-Étienne]], [[Loire (department)|Loire]],
Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France |height = {{convert|1.75|m|ftin|0|order=flip|abbr=on}} |weight = {{convert|74|kg|stlb|abbr=on|order=flip}} | position = {{rlp|SH|SO|FB}} | club1 = {{nowrap|[[Catalans Dragons]]}} | year1start = 2018 | year1end = 25 | appearances1 = 103 | tries1 = 25 | goals1 = 165 | fieldgoals1 = 1 | points1 = 431 | club2 = {{nowrap|[[Hull Kingston Rovers]]}} | year2start = 2025 | year2end = present | appearances2 = 28 | tries2 = 11 | goals2 = 79 | fieldgoals2 = 0 | points2 = 198 | teamA = [[France national rugby league team|France]] | yearAstart = 2021 | yearAend = present | appearancesA = 8 | triesA = 2 | goalsA = 18 | fieldgoalsA = 0 | pointsA = 44 | new = yes | source = [https://www.loverugbyleague.com/stats/players/arthur-mourgue/ loverugbyleague][http://www.catalansdragons.com/fiche-491-mourgue-arthur/ Catalans Dragons profile][http://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/arthur-mourgue/summary.html Rugby League Project][http://www.itsrugby.co.uk/player_42457.html Itsrugby]{{Rugby league records|title=Arthur Mourgue|id=704}} | updated = 16 May 2026 }} '''Arthur Mourgue''' (born 2 May 1999) is a French professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|sh|so}} and {{rlp|fb}} for [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] in the [[Super League]] and [[France national rugby league team|France]] at international level. He has previously played for [[Saint-Esteve XIII Catalan|Saint-Esteve]] in the [[Elite One Championship]]. ==Background== Mourgue was born in [[Saint-Étienne]], [[Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes]], [[France]]. ==Playing career== ===Catalans Dragons=== In 2018, Mourgue made his début for the [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]] against the [[Warrington Wolves]].{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league|title=Super League: Warrington Wolves v Catalans Dragons|publisher=BBC|date=10 August 2018|access-date=10 August 2018}} In 2021, Mourgue was part of the Catalans team that won the [[League Leaders' Shield]].{{cite news | url=https://www.bbc.com/sport/rugby-league/59222202 | title=Catalans Dragons: Arthur Mourgue signs new deal with Super League leaders' shield winners | date=9 November 2021 | access-date=16 March 2025 | work=BBC Sport}} On 9 October, 2021, Mourgue played for Catalans in their [[2021 Super League Grand Final]] defeat against [[St Helens RFC|St Helens]].{{cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/58858850|title=Super League Grand Final: Catalans Dragons 10-12 St Helens: Saints win three in a row|work=BBC Sport}} On 14 October, 2023, Mourgue played in Catalans' [[2023 Super League Grand Final]] loss to the [[Wigan Warriors]], coming off the interchange bench with 15 minutes remaining.{{cite news | url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2023/oct/14/catalans-dragons-wigan-super-league-grand-final-rugby-league-match-report/ | title=Wigan Warriors crowned Super League champions after downing Dragons | newspaper=The Observer | date=14 October 2023 | last1=Bower | first1=Aaron }} ===Hull Kingston Rovers=== On 16 March, 2025, Mourgue joined [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] until the end of the 2028 season.{{cite news | url=https://www.yorkshirepost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/hull-kr-boss-willie-peters-explains-why-arthur-mourgue-is-good-fit-after-landing-catalans-dragons-full-back-5035685 | title=Hull KR boss Willie Peters explains why Arthur Mourgue is good fit after landing Catalans Dragons full-back | newspaper=The Yorkshire Post | first=James | last=O'Brien | date=16 March 2025 | access-date=16 March 2025}}{{cite news | url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/hull-kr-snap-up-international-playmaker-on-long-term-deal-as-2026-signing-fast-tracked | first=Ben | last=Olawumi | website=Love Rugby League | title=Hull KR snap up international playmaker on long-term deal as 2026 signing fast-tracked | date=16 March 2025 | access-date=16 March 2025}} At the 2025 [[Magic Weekend]], Mourgue scored two tries and kicked nine goals as Hull Kingston Rovers defeated Salford 54-0.{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/c05nrg4mgzeo|title=Hull KR hammer Salford to extend lead at top|website=www.bbc.co.uk}} On 18 september 2025, Mourge Scored a crucial try in Hull Kingston Rovers victory against Warrington in the final game of the season to win the League Leaders Shield https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/c39rzxxpyjeo On 9 October 2025, Mourgue played in Hull Kingston Rovers 2025 Super League Grand Final victory over Wigan.{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cx2jw497jpzo/|title=Hull KR beat Wigan in Grand Final to complete treble|website=www.bbc.co.uk}} On 19 February 2026, Mourgue played in Hull Kingston Rovers [[World Club Challenge]] victory against [[Brisbane Broncos|Brisbane]].{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/live/cwy6dlgx3kyt/|title=Relive Hull KR's World Club Challenge win over Brisbane|website=www.bbc.co.uk}} ==International career== He was selected in France 9s squad for the [[2019 Rugby League World Cup 9s]].{{cite web|date=2 October 2019|title=La liste des joueurs pour la Coupe du Monde dévoilée!|url=https://www.ffr13.fr/actualite-a-la-une/la-liste-des-joueurs-pour-la-coupe-du-monde-devoilee/|publisher=FFRXIII|accessdate=1 November 2019|language=French}}{{cite web|date=10 October 2019|title=XIII de France: Romain Puso remplace Lilian Albert, forfait!|url=https://www.ffr13.fr/actualite-a-la-une/xiii-de-france-romain-puso-remplace-lilian-albert-forfait/|publisher=FFR XIII|accessdate=1 November 2019|language=French}} In France's opening match of the [[2021 Rugby League World Cup]] against Greece, Mourgue scored a try and kicked seven goals during Les Blues 34-12 victory.{{cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/63293849|title=Rugby League World Cup: France 34-12 Greece - Les Bleus beat debutants|work=BBC Sport }} He kicked four conversions in the 36-0 World Cup play-off win over {{rlnt|Jamaica}} on 25 October 2025{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=27 Oct 2025|author=Ben Olawumi|title=Super League stars shine as France clinch penultimate spot in 2026 Rugby League World Cup|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/france-book-spot-in-2026-rugby-league-world-cup}} ==References== {{reflist|30em}} ==External links== {{commons category}}
